center.name: 普魯斯河
center.summary: 普魯斯河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联13种鸟类，包括Wire-tailed manakin、Long-crested pygmy tyrant、Bluish-slate antshrike等13种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Brazil from the upper Purus River northeast to Pará where it occurs between the Tapajós and Xingu rivers, and south and west into northern Mato Grosso state, southeastern Peru, and north-central Bolivia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: undulatus is found in southwestern Amazonia south of the Amazon River in eastern Peru, northern Bolivia, and Brazil at least as far east as the Rio Purus and possibly to the Rio Madeira. The bar-bellied woodcreeper inhabits humid lowland forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: minor is found in south-central Amazonian Brazil south of the Amazon between the Purus and Tocantins rivers. The black-chinned antbird inhabits lowland evergreen forest, almost always in várzea forest along larger rivers, along smaller watercourses, and along the edges of lakes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in western Brazil south of the Amazon and west of the lower Juruá River south to its upper reaches and the upper Purus River, in southeastern Peru south of the Department of Junín, and into northwestern Bolivia to Cochabamba Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in Brazil south of the Amazon between the Rio Purus and the state of Maranhão

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: juruanus: south of the upper Amazon/Solimões from northeastern Peru into northwestern Brazil to the Purus River The grey-chested greenlet inhabits the canopy, edges, and clearings of humid forest including várzea, permanently flooded forest, and secondary forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the upper Purus River basin of far western Brazil, the Ucayali and Madre de Dios river basins in southeastern Peru, and Pando Department in far northern Bolivia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: auricularis: central Brazil south of the Amazon between the Rio Purus and Pará state and south into northeastern Bolivia The ochre-throated foliage-gleaner inhabits a variety of forested landscapes across its very large range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pectoral sparrow is non-migratory and can be found everywhere in the Amazon Basin east of the Andes except for the western parts between the Negro and Purus rivers. Besides the Amazon jungle, it is found in eastern and north-eastern Brazil. It occupies altitudes up to in southern Venezuela, in southeastern Peru, and in Bolivia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: minor: east of the Andes in Peru south of the Maranon and Amazon, south into Bolivia's Pando and La Paz departments, and east into western Brazil to the Purus River and perhaps beyond The demarcations between the ranges of the subspecies, and especially that between dissors and signata, are not well defined. The thrush-like antpitta inhabits humid rainforest in the lowlands and foothills, primarily terra firme

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: pallida is found in Brazil south of the Amazon between the rios Purus and Madeira, and probably south into the eastern part of north-central Bolivia's Pando Department. The undulated antshrike inhabits lowland evergreen forest such as terra firme

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: There its range extends east north of the Amazon to the Branco and Negro rivers and south of the Amazon to the upper Juruá and middle Purus rivers. The wire-tailed manakin inhabits a variety of somewhat open landscapes; in all of them it favors areas along watercourses

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The orange-fronted plushcrown is found in southeastern Colombia's Putumayo and Amazonas departments, eastern Ecuador and Peru, Beni Department in northeastern Bolivia, and from them into western Brazil east to the lower Juruá and upper Purus rivers
